caption: A woman with dark hair styled in braids and a bun sits in a studio setting, wearing a dark green t-shirt. She is positioned behind a black table with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of her. To her left and behind her are blue and white banners. One banner features the text "BOSS TALK 101" and the phrase "It's A Unique Hustle." Another banner behind her contains the words "PODCAST," "Talk About It!," and "with Us." A smaller logo on the table reads "BOSS TALK 101." To the far left, a framed picture showing a close-up of hands is visible on the wall. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains seated and maintains a similar posture, gazing slightly to her right with a neutral expression, while the scene remains static with no significant movement or changes in the environment.
